questionHtml: Justify whether a 1.0 dm3 solution made from 0.10 mol NH3 and 0.20 mol HCl will form a buffer solution.
markschemeHtml:
no AND is not a weak acid conjugate base system

OR

no AND weak base «totally» neutralized/ weak base is not in excess

OR

no AND will not neutralize small amount of acid ✔

 

Accept “no AND contains 0.10 mol NH4Cl + 0.10 mol HCl”.

meta.title: Justify whether a 1.0 dm3 solution made from 0.10 mol NH3 and 0.20 mol HCl will form a buffer solution.
